name: Lead Scoring Dashboard
description: Give SDRs a ranked work list today, and tell leadership whether the scoring model is actually predictive enough to trust.
alsoSurfaces: Which scored leads should each SDR work today?
How predictive is the current scoring model on conversion?
Where is the score over- or under-fitting?
Which scoring features matter most for downstream outcomes?
beforeWeRun: Score source: Salesforce, HubSpot, or composite?
Conversion definition: MQL → SQL or all the way to closed-won?

whatYoullGet.name: SDR daily work list
whatYoullGet.desc: Top-N scored leads ranked, with persona, source, and score.

whatYoullGet.name: Predictiveness check
whatYoullGet.desc: Score-bucket-by-conversion-rate showing if score predicts outcome.

whatYoullGet.name: Calibration table
whatYoullGet.desc: Predicted vs. actual conversion at each score band.

whatYoullGet.name: Feature importance
whatYoullGet.desc: Which signals are driving score; rank-ordered.

whatYoullGet.name: False-positive flags
whatYoullGet.desc: High-score leads that don't convert; pattern surfaced.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your scoring dashboard in ~9 min.
